user.title: Set up Webex Status
user.description: Enter your Webex Bot token and your Webex People API person ID. See the [setup guide](https://github.com/owenmettam/HomeAssistant-WebexStatus) for instructions on obtaining these values.

data_description.bot_token: The access token from your Webex Bot (valid for ~100 years).
data_description.person_id: Your encoded UUID from the Webex People API 'Get My Own Details' endpoint.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid bot token. Please check and try again.
error.person_not_found: Person ID not found. Please verify the encoded UUID.
error.rate_limited: Rate limited by Webex API. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Webex API. Check your network.

abort.already_configured: This Webex user is already configured.
